visual_findings: The application Drawing Review screenshot was captured successfully, but the generated drawing remains visually unacceptable against the same-name reference.

The generated drawing still contains a dense slanted AutoDimension-like callout stack crossing the front/top view area; the reference drawing uses concise separated dimensions and a compact right-side note/callout group.
The generated DisplayDim count is still below the same-name reference floor in the latest strict/no-slack run, so structural evidence also does not support acceptance.
The right-side small projected view is clearer than earlier attempts, but the main hole/radius/thread callout group has not been recreated in the reference-style compact leader area.
The title block and technical notes remain visually different from the reference layout and cannot be accepted by API/style evidence alone.
cases.required_next_action: Replace the remaining AutoDimension path with explicit reference-intent DisplayDim creation or a model-dimension seed for the input_work copy; keep the compact right-side leader area and rerun 006 through Drawing Review UI screenshot judgement.

acceptance_rule: A drawing is not accepted until the application Drawing Review UI screenshot is visually judged PASS against the same-name reference drawing.
